# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  # Apply to specific workload
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  # ALLOW action - only explicitly permitted traffic is allowed
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Rule 1: Allow frontend service account to access specific API endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service-account"
            # Require mTLS by specifying namespaces (prevents plaintext bypass)
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
              # Prevent path normalization bypass - avoid regex, use exact/prefix
            ports:
              - "8080"
      when:
        - key: request.headers[content-type]
          values:
            - "application/json"

    # Rule 2: Allow order-service to access order-related endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Rule 3: Allow monitoring service read-only access to health endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"

---
# Deny-all policy as a baseline for the namespace (defense in depth)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-baseline
  namespace: production
spec:
  # Empty spec with no rules denies all traffic by default
  {}

---
# Enforce strict mTLS to prevent authorization bypass via plaintext traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Explicitly deny requests with suspicious path patterns to prevent normalization bypass
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-path-bypass-attempts
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    # Block path traversal and normalization bypass attempts
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "*/\\*"
              - "*/../*"
              - "*/%2e%2e/*"
              - "*/%2F*"
              - "*/%5C*"
    # Block requests without proper headers that might indicate bypass attempts
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - "production"
              - "monitoring"
              - "istio-system"

---
# Custom deny policy to block unauthenticated sources (no valid SPIFFE identity)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-unauthenticated-traffic
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account"
